title: Ending Justice And Replay Value
objective: Make endings feel earned and ensure replay reveals new interpretive value rather than alternate wallpaper.
storyQuestions: What pattern of play leads to each ending, and is that pattern traceable?
Do non-ideal endings still resolve emotionally and logically?
What replay-only texture changes interpretation rather than merely branching text?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Each touched ending corresponds to a traceable pattern of play.
At least one replay path now reveals theory-level meaning rather than only extra prose.
